title: Do not trade away full waves for low-conversion fights
body: ADC economy problems often start before the fight itself. The real leak is usually giving away wave state or delaying a clean reset for a play that does not reliably convert into kill, crash or plate value.
actionables: Do not chase extended kills if the cost is a full wave without a guaranteed crash.
Review whether your first weak reset was forced by greed or by unavoidable pressure.
Track which botlane losses start with wave loss rather than pure mechanics.

source.title: ADC economy examples
source.notes: Template card to show the expected format.
